name: getSessionXpEntry reports phantom reflection bonus when multiplier not applied
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L1-06] when reflectionMultiplierApplied is false, a non-zero reflectionBonusXp is returned, implying XP not actually earned. Fix: return reflectionBonusXp 0 when !reflectionMultiplierApplied.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: getSessionXpEntry computes reflectedAmount - entry.amount even when reflectionMultiplierApplied is false, so the API reports a reflectionBonusXp that was never actually earned. Variants: (a) multiplier not applied returns base XP with reflectionBonusXp 0, (b) multiplier applied on this session returns the earned bonus, (c) multiplier applied on a different ledger entry keeps this session bonus at 0. Regression test: apps/api/src/services/xp.test.ts fails without the fix and passes with it, updating getSessionXpEntry coverage for all three reflection states.
